# DIMO Build — Vehicle Data Developer Platform

> DIMO is open infrastructure for connected vehicles. One permissioned API gives
> developers real-time telemetry, vehicle identity, and event webhooks across
> 50+ automotive OEMs. Owner consent is enforced through the SACD model, built
> to meet GDPR and the EU Data Act. The core protocol and tooling are open
> source. Free tier available; paid plans for production scale.

## Getting started
- [Introduction](https://www.dimo.org/docs/introduction/what-can-you-build)
- [Quickstart](https://www.dimo.org/docs/quickstart)
- [Getting Started](https://www.dimo.org/docs/getting-started/create-your-account)
- [Key Concepts](https://www.dimo.org/docs/key-concepts)
- [What can you build?](https://www.dimo.org/docs/introduction/where-can-you-start)
- [FAQ](https://www.dimo.org/docs/faq)

## API references
- [Identity API](https://www.dimo.org/docs/api-references/identity-api/introduction)
- [Telemetry API](https://www.dimo.org/docs/api-references/telemetry-api/introduction)
- [Fetch API](https://www.dimo.org/docs/api-references/fetch-api/introduction)
- [Attestation API](https://www.dimo.org/docs/api-references/attestation-api)
- [Device Definitions API](https://www.dimo.org/docs/api-references/device-definitions-api)
- [Token Exchange API](https://www.dimo.org/docs/api-references/token-exchange-api)
- [Vehicle Triggers API](https://www.dimo.org/docs/api-references/vehicle-triggers-api)

## Blog
- [Data Wars: The Consent Management Crisis OEMs Didn't See Coming](https://www.dimo.org/blog/data-wars-the-consent-management-crisis-oems-didnt-see-coming)
- [DIMO Vehicle Simulator: Build Without a Car](https://www.dimo.org/blog/dimo-vehicle-simulator)

## For AI assistants & coding agents
- [DIMO Platform Skill](https://github.com/DIMO-Network/dimo-platform-skill): a drop-in knowledge pack that gives an AI agent the full DIMO platform model — architecture, APIs, SACD permissions, contract addresses, and SDK signatures.
- [DIMO MCP Server](https://github.com/DIMO-Network/mcp-dimo): a Model Context Protocol server that lets an AI assistant query DIMO data and call platform tools directly.
